sections.title: Safety Essentials
sections.summary: Planning a solo trip to New York City for the First time? NYC is one of the safest major cities, and this guide helps first-time solo travelers stay safe, choose the right neighborhoods, and travel confidently in 2026
bullets: Stay aware on the subway and avoid empty cars late at night.
Use well‑lit streets and stick to main avenues after dark.
Keep your bag in front of you in crowded areas.
Trust your instincts and step away from uncomfortable situations.
